title: AudienceTag
description: An atomic, stable audience-segmentation tag (role, affiliation, intent, capability, network position, or context) that personas are composed from. Distinct from TagAssignment, which classifies data fields; AudienceTag classifies reachable audiences for governed prospecting.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this audience tag.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

family.description: Tag family the tag belongs to.

inclusionSignals.description: Signals that qualify a member for this tag.

activationChannels.description: Channels through which this tag is reachable.

primaryMetrics.description: Success metrics most predictive for this tag.
